onboarding.subtitle: Staff attendance, brewed simply
onboarding.ownerDesc: Create your workspace and manage staff
onboarding.idExplain: Share this ID with your employer so they can add you as an employee.
onboarding.linkExplain: Enter the employee ID provided by your employer.

dashboard.emptySubtitle: Your restaurant is all set up. Let's add your team and get attendance tracking started.
dashboard.emptyAddEmployeeDesc: Create a profile and QR code for check-in
dashboard.emptyCreateShiftDesc: Define morning, evening, or custom hours
dashboard.emptyConfigureDesc: Set timezone, IP restriction, and more

employee.name: Name
employee.managerPermissionsDesc: Choose which areas this manager can administer. Workspace settings, billing, sub-QR codes and promoting other managers stay with the owner.
employee.permEmployeesDesc: Create, edit, and remove employees (cannot promote managers)
employee.permShiftsDesc: Create, edit, and remove shifts and per-day overrides
employee.permClosuresDesc: Create, edit, and remove restaurant closure dates
employee.permLeaveDesc: Approve, reject, and cancel leave requests for any employee
employee.permAttendanceDesc: View all attendance and edit records when corrections are needed
employee.attendanceTrackingHint: Set "Excluded" for staff who help run the workspace but don't follow a shift (e.g. admin helpers). They can still check in to log times — they just won't be counted as absent.
employee.roleManagerHint: Managers need a linked user account. Link one before saving.
employee.createdGuideTitle: Next, help this employee check in
employee.createdGuideDescription: Finish the setup by linking their user account and sharing the check-in instructions before their first shift.
employee.createdGuideLinkDesc: Ask the employee to sign in and send their user public ID, or share this employee ID so they can link during onboarding.
employee.createdGuideShareTitle: Share the employee ID or QR
employee.createdGuideShareDesc: The QR code and employee ID below are what staff use to connect their account to this profile.
employee.createdGuideShiftMissing: No shift is assigned yet. Add one so late, absent, and early-leave status can be calculated.
employee.createdGuideAdvancedDesc: After staff profiles are ready, tighten check-in rules so attendance is recorded from the right place, network, and device.
employee.createdGuideIpDesc: Only allow check-ins from your restaurant Wi-Fi or approved network.
employee.createdGuideGeofencingDesc: Require staff to be near the restaurant before check-in is accepted.
employee.createdGuideDeviceDesc: Keep check-in and check-out on the same phone to reduce buddy punching.
employee.createdGuideReadFullGuide: Read the full owner setup guide

verification.title: Check-in verification
verification.atRestaurantHint: Check-in is only allowed within the restaurant boundary
verification.sameDeviceHint: Same device for check-in and check-out, and not reused by another employee that day
verification.restaurantNetworkHint: Check-in is only allowed from an approved network
verification.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Espresso to enforce this
verification.upsell: Upgrade to Espresso to verify where, on which device, and from which network staff check in.

settings.geofencingDesc: Only allow check-ins within a set distance from your restaurant
settings.deviceVerificationDesc: Require the same device for check-in and check-out, and prevent one device from checking in multiple employees

checkin.ipRestricted: Check-in not allowed from this location
checkin.locationDenied: Location access denied. Check-in may fail if geofencing is enabled.
checkin.outsideGeofence: You are outside the allowed check-in area
checkin.deviceMismatch: Check-out must be from the same device used for check-in
checkin.deviceAlreadyUsed: This device has already been used to check in another employee today

qrCodes.intro: Create additional QR codes for different sections or floors. Only assigned employees can scan a sub-QR. Settings can be inherited from the workspace or overridden per QR.
qrCodes.name: Name
qrCodes.managerHint: Manager must have a linked user account. They can approve/reject leave for assigned employees.
qrCodes.noEmployees: No employees in this workspace yet.
qrCodes.ipRestrictionDesc: Only allow check-in via this QR from listed network addresses (e.g. your restaurant Wi-Fi). When inheriting, the workspace’s IP rules apply.
qrCodes.geofencingDesc: Require employees to be physically near a coordinate to check in via this QR. Useful for sectioning floors or outdoor areas. Radius minimum is 50 meters.
qrCodes.deviceVerificationDesc: Bind check-in/out to a single device per employee per day. Prevents one phone from punching in multiple employees and forces check-out from the same device used for check-in.
qrCodes.workspaceOn: Currently turned on at the workspace level
qrCodes.workspaceOff: Currently turned off at the workspace level
qrCodes.customForThisQr: Custom rules for this QR — workspace settings are ignored.
qrCodes.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? Employees assigned to it will lose access. This cannot be undone.
qrCodes.planGate: Multiple QR codes require the Double Espresso plan
qrCodes.afterCreateHint: You’ll be taken to the QR detail page to assign employees and adjust settings.

ipRestriction.title: Unlock IP restriction
ipRestriction.description: Restrict QR check-ins to specific IP addresses. Keep attendance accurate by ensuring staff can only check in from your restaurant's network.

geofencing.title: Unlock geofencing
geofencing.description: Set a geographic boundary around your restaurant. Staff can only check in when they are physically nearby.

deviceVerification.title: Unlock device verification
deviceVerification.description: Prevent buddy punching by requiring the same device for check-in and check-out.

leaveRequests.title: Unlock leave requests
leaveRequests.description: Let your staff submit leave requests directly. Review, approve, or reject them from your dashboard.

shiftTimeRules.title: Unlock per-day schedules
shiftTimeRules.description: Override shift hours for specific days of the week. Perfect for restaurants with different hours on weekends.

telegramNotifications.title: Unlock Telegram notifications
telegramNotifications.description: Send real-time leave requests, shift changes, closures, and daily summaries to a Telegram chat or group.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitlePrefix: Everything you need to know about DailyBrew. Can't find what you're looking for?

q.freePlan: What's included in the Free plan?
q.managerDefaults: What are the default manager permissions?
q.managerLimit: How many managers can I have?
q.promoteManager: How do I promote an employee to manager?
q.managerNotAllowed: What can a manager NOT do?
q.oauthSignIn: Can I use Google or Apple to sign in?
q.resetPassword: How do I reset my password?

a.whatIsDailybrew: DailyBrew is a staff attendance tracking platform built for restaurants. It provides QR code check-in, shift management, closure periods, and leave request handling, all in one simple dashboard.
a.whoIsItFor: DailyBrew is designed for restaurant owners, managers, and staff. Owners manage the workspace, shifts, and employees. Managers receive only the permissions you grant them — for example leave approvals, attendance oversight, employee management, or any combination. Staff check in and out by scanning the workspace QR code.
a.mobileApp: Staff check-in works entirely through the mobile web browser. When an employee scans their QR code, a mobile-optimized check-in page opens instantly. No app download is required.
a.freePlan: The Free plan includes up to 10 employees, QR check-in, shift tracking, closure periods, and the attendance dashboard. It is free forever with no time limit.
a.espressoPlan: Espresso supports up to 20 employees and adds leave request management, IP restriction, device verification, geofencing, per-day shift schedules, manager role with granular permissions (up to 2), push and email notifications, and daily attendance summaries.
a.espressoCost: Espresso costs $14.99 per month, or $149 per year if you choose annual billing. The yearly plan saves you $30.88 compared to paying monthly.
a.cancelAnytime: Yes, there are no contracts or lock-in periods. You can cancel your Espresso subscription at any time from your dashboard Settings. After cancellation, you will continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.
a.qrCheckin: Each workspace has a unique QR code. Display it at your restaurant entrance. Staff open the DailyBrew app, scan the QR code, and tap the Check In button to record their arrival. They scan again and tap Check Out when they leave.
a.geofencing: Geofencing restricts check-in to a specific geographic area. You set a center point and a radius, and staff must be physically within that area to check in. This ensures attendance is only recorded when employees are actually at the restaurant.
a.ipRestriction: IP restriction only allows check-in from specific IP addresses, such as your restaurant WiFi network. When enabled, staff scanning the QR code from a different network will see a message explaining they need to be connected to the restaurant network.
a.closures: When you define a closure period (for example, a holiday or renovation), no attendance is expected on those dates. The system skips those days entirely, so employees will not be marked as absent during closures.
a.managerRole: The manager role lets you promote trusted employees and choose exactly which areas they can administer. Each manager has a per-permission toggle for: manage employees, manage shifts, manage closures, manage leave, and manage attendance. You can grant any combination — for example, a head waiter who only handles leave approvals, or a co-runner who manages everything except billing and settings.
a.managerDefaults: Newly promoted managers start with "manage leave" and "manage attendance" enabled — meaning they can approve leave for any employee and view all attendance records. You can flip the other toggles on or off at any time from the employee detail page.
a.managerLimit: On the Espresso plan, you can have up to 2 managers per workspace. The Double Espresso plan allows unlimited managers.
a.promoteManager: Go to the employee detail page and click "Promote to manager". The employee must have a linked user account (they need to sign in to use manager features). Once promoted, a "Manager permissions" card appears below — toggle each capability on or off as needed. You can demote them back to a regular employee at any time.
a.managerNotAllowed: No matter which permissions you grant, managers cannot rename or delete the workspace, edit workspace settings (IP / device / geofencing / timezone), manage billing, mint or edit sub-QR codes, or promote / demote other managers. These remain owner-only.
a.signUp: Click the "Get started" button on the homepage. Create an account with your email and password, then set up your workspace by naming your restaurant. From there you can add employees and generate QR codes.
a.oauthSignIn: Yes, DailyBrew supports both Google and Apple sign-in. You can link your account during registration or from your profile settings later.
a.resetPassword: Click "Forgot password" on the sign-in page. Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link. The link expires after 1 hour for security.

cta.text: Still have questions? We are happy to help.

index.title: Everything you need to track attendance
index.subtitle: From QR check-in to geofencing — simple tools that work for restaurants of any size.

qrCheckin.title: QR code check-in
qrCheckin.desc: Display one QR code at your restaurant. Staff scan it from the DailyBrew app to check in and out — no extra hardware needed.

employeeManagement.title: Employee management
employeeManagement.desc: Add staff, assign them to shifts, and track their attendance history. Manage active and inactive employees from one screen.

shiftTracking.title: Shift tracking
shiftTracking.desc: Define morning, evening, or custom shifts with start and end times. Late arrivals and early departures are flagged automatically with configurable grace periods.

closurePeriods.title: Closure periods
closurePeriods.desc: Mark holidays, renovations, or any days your restaurant is closed. Attendance is paused automatically — no false absences.

realtimeDashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
realtimeDashboard.desc: See who is present, late, on leave, or absent at a glance. Owner and employee dashboards with live stats and recent history.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.desc: Available in English, French, and Khmer. Staff can use the app in the language they are most comfortable with.

ipRestriction.title: IP restriction
ipRestriction.desc: Lock check-ins to your restaurant's WiFi or network. If staff aren't on an approved IP, they can't clock in — no remote punching.

deviceVerification.title: Device verification
deviceVerification.desc: Each employee must check in and out from the same device per day. Stops buddy punching — a colleague can't clock out on someone else's phone.
highlights: One device per employee per day

geofencing.title: Geofencing
geofencing.desc: Draw a virtual perimeter around your restaurant. Staff must be physically within the GPS radius to check in — configurable from 50m to 5,000m.

rolesPermissions.title: Roles and permissions
rolesPermissions.desc: Promote trusted staff to managers and choose exactly which areas they can administer — employees, shifts, closures, leave, attendance — toggle each one on or off per manager. Settings, billing and sub-QR codes always stay with the owner.

basilbookIntegration.desc: Connect DailyBrew to your BasilBook accounting system. Link employees by username and let BasilBook pull attendance data via a secure API.

perDayShifts.title: Per-day shift schedules
perDayShifts.desc: Different hours on different days? Override shift times per day of the week. Monday 7-3, Saturday 9-5 — all on the same shift.

leaveRequests.title: Leave request management
leaveRequests.desc: Employees submit leave requests (paid or unpaid, full or partial day). Owners approve or reject with a note. Full history and status tracking.

notifications.title: Push & email notifications
notifications.desc: Real-time push notifications and email alerts for leave requests, approvals, shift changes, closures, and daily attendance summaries.

why.title: Why restaurant teams choose DailyBrew
why.subtitle: Built specifically for restaurants, cafes, and small teams.

reasons.noHardware: No hardware — just a printed QR code

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Free for up to 10 employees. No credit card required.
